freeze_point_note: Slice covers 2026-09-15 through 2026-10-12. Unread count at freeze: 14. Threads below are the ones relevant to the October 20, 2026 Maribel sit-down work. Mass-marketing and routine hospital all-staff mail are not included.

threads.label: Studio
threads.subject: Invoice MKD-2026-1184 - Fall Showcase costume order (NET 30)
threads.body_excerpt: Hi Amanda, attached is invoice MKD-2026-1184 for the Fall Showcase order placed 2026-09-28. Total due $1,360.00, net 30 from invoice date so payable by 2026-11-01. Card on file is the Amex ending 1007. Reply to confirm or I can run it on the 1st. Order details on page 2: 34 costume pieces across the six routines. - Maya, MK Dancewear

threads.label: Studio/Books
threads.subject: Re: Quick note - Xero feed gap and the Q3 close
threads.body_excerpt: Amanda - circling back on the note I left 2026-09-22 and again 2026-10-02. The Square feed into Xero stopped pulling on 2026-09-04 (the token refresh failed and the disconnect notice went out the same day). Stripe has been intermittent since 2026-09-12. QuickBooks is current on both. I would not trust the Xero September net of $683.62 right now. The QuickBooks September net of $1,261.40 will be the authoritative figure once I finish the reconciliation. There are five entries totaling roughly $972 that I have lined up to import manually. I can have that done in 90 minutes if you can reauthorize the Square connection from your end. - Priya

threads.label: Studio/Books
threads.subject: One more - Studio Fund transfer cadence note
threads.body_excerpt: Side note - I see you bumped the Studio Fund transfer to $500 in September. Wanted to confirm this is the new running rate rather than a one-off, since the planning brief you sent me in February still has $400 in the assumptions column. Want to update the Q4 model accordingly. - Priya

threads.label: Studio/Books
threads.subject: [Xero] Connection failed - Square feed needs reauthorization
threads.body_excerpt: Automated reminder. The Square bank feed for Amanda Webb Dance Instruction (org id wxe-7711) has not refreshed since 2026-09-04. Please reconnect from Settings > Bank accounts. This is the 5th reminder.

threads.label: Studio/Grants
threads.subject: Berks County Foundation - Women in Arts Application Received
threads.body_excerpt: Confirming receipt of application BCF-WIA-2026-094 submitted 2026-09-12. Review committee meets the week of 2026-11-23. Notification will go out by 2026-12-04. Award amount $5,000. Reference number above is required for any correspondence.

threads.label: Studio/Grants
threads.subject: PA WBC Aspire Grant - Proposal narrative reviewer assigned
threads.body_excerpt: Hello Amanda, your draft narrative for the PA WBC Aspire 2027 cycle has been reviewed by Maritza Colon. Comments attached. Final submission deadline is 2026-11-30 at 23:59 ET. Required pieces still outstanding on our checklist: signed financial projections (FY2027), letter of community support, Schedule C cover sheet. Workshop on submission mechanics is 2026-11-05 12:00 ET, registration optional but recommended.

threads.label: Studio/Grants
threads.subject: Reading Beautification Storefront Program - 2027 cycle update
threads.body_excerpt: Cycle is open. Jurisdiction is West Reading and the Penn Avenue corridor only. Award up to $15,000 against a 1:1 cash match. Pre-application due 2027-01-15, full application due 2027-03-01. Storefronts must be street-level with frontage on a covered block. Wyomissing addresses are not eligible this cycle.

threads.label: Studio/Grants
threads.subject: Eileen Fisher Foundation 2027 LOI window opening
threads.body_excerpt: LOI window opens 2027-01-06 and closes 2027-02-15. Full proposals invited by 2027-03-10, due 2027-04-15. Average award $80,000. Funding priorities for 2027: women-led arts collectives, intergenerational programming, place-based work.

threads.label: Studio/Grants
threads.subject: SBA Microloan Program - Berks intermediary intake
threads.body_excerpt: Next intake window opens 2027-01-05. Loans up to $35,000, terms up to 7 years, rate 8.5 percent fixed. Required: business plan, 12-month cashflow projection, two years personal tax returns. Pre-counseling session required before submission.

threads.label: Studio
threads.subject: Re: October 20 sit-down - 7:00pm at the studio works
threads.body_excerpt: Yes, 7:00pm Tuesday October 20 at the studio is fine. I'll have coffee. We can do an hour and a half. I want to talk through the spring schedule, the showcase, and where you are on the year-two question. - Maribel

threads.label: Studio
threads.subject: Re: October rent
threads.body_excerpt: Got it. The $500 hit my account on the 6th this month, a couple days later than usual, no worries. - M

threads.label: Studio/Showcase
threads.subject: Re: showcase music - the Vimeo license thing
threads.body_excerpt: So I heard back from the Carry rights holder - $35 for a one-time Vimeo sync, they sent a form. The Berks Avenue track is fine on the ASCAP umbrella, no extra needed. The Reading Lights kids' track has me a little worried because it's a remix and I can't find the original credit cleanly. Going to dig more tomorrow. Thursday rehearsal still on? - Nat

threads.label: CEU
threads.subject: BCEN - CEN Renewal cycle reminder, deadline 2027-03-31
threads.body_excerpt: Your CEN certification is up for renewal. Submission deadline 2027-03-31. Required: 100 CE hours within the four-year cycle, of which at least 75 must be Category A (Emergency Nursing). Your current ledger shows 62 hours total (49 Category A, 13 Category B). Modules in your portal showing in-progress: 4. Modules not yet started in the recommended sequence: 6.
